results.content:
•

No-Code Website Builder

•

All-in-one Workspace

Taskade is the origin of living software. One prompt creates a connected system that thinks, learns, and grows with you. Build dashboards, tools, and websites powered by memory, intelligence, and motion. Projects remember. Agents reason and act. Automations move with intent. Your workspace becomes a living system where creation never stops. No code. No setup. Just creation. The backend thinks, the interface builds itself, and every idea comes alive. One prompt, one app, one living workspace.

 Overview
 Launches8
 Reviews107
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Forum
 Team

# Taskade Reviews

### The community submitted 107 reviews to tell us what they like about Taskade, what Taskade can do better, and more.

Based on 107 reviews [...] What stands out most is the AI integration — it's genuinely useful, not just a gimmick. Being able to generate task lists, summarize notes, and get suggestions right inside my workspace saves me a huge amount of time every day. The AI agents feature in particular is impressive, letting you automate repetitive parts of your workflow in a way that actually makes sense.

The real-time collaboration is seamless. My team can jump into the same project, make edits, and see updates instantly — it feels as smooth as any dedicated collaboration tool out there. Combined with the beautiful templates library, getting a new project off the ground takes minutes instead of hours. [...] #### What needs improvement

Would love the ability for agents to restructure the workspace mid-project when the scope shifts — right now it feels like you need to start a new prompt if things evolve significantly. Better visibility into what each agent is actively doing at any moment would also help build trust for teams handing off real work to it.

#### vs Alternatives

Tried Notion AI and ClickUp for team project management, and looked at Relay.app for agent-based automation. Notion is great for docs but the AI feels bolted on. Taskade felt purpose-built for agent-first workflows — the workspace generates itself around your goal rather than asking you to configure it.

Ratings

Ease of use

Reliability

Value for money

Customization

Top reviewed

Across the top-reviewed set, teams gravitate to flexible hubs that blend docs, tasks, databases, and AI. Notion leads for customizable wikis, project planning, and connected knowledge; Fibery stands out for deeply relational workflows spanning product, CRM, and ops; Taskade pushes further into prompt-built apps, agents, and automations for fast-moving teams.

- Pre-qualify companies with the right person at those companies to sell your product to  
- Generate invoices and update their invoice trackers based on email and contract  
- Pre-meeting prep for client or sales lead call  
- Generate pricing and proposal based on meeting notes and existing contracts

results.title: FuseBase Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### What's great

fast performance (1)user interface (8)client portals (15)

Report

 141 views

•3 reviews

#### What's great

FuseBase does an excellent job of unifying internal and external collaboration in one clean workspace. The biggest standout is how the AI agents are embedded directly into projects — they handle routine admin tasks like organizing content, summarizing discussions, and keeping workspaces up to date, which genuinely saves time.

The no-code setup makes it easy to build client portals and internal hubs without relying on engineering, and the separation between internal spaces and external-facing portals is well thought out. I also found the browser extension and automation hub especially useful for capturing information and connecting workflows across tools. [...] Subscribe

Team collaboration software

•

No-code Platforms

Scattered tools and clunky collaboration cost you time and money. FuseBase unifies internal and external teamwork—powered by AI agents that automate admin work, so you focus on what matters most. It’s like Notion, but purpose-built for internal teams and external collaboration. Turbo-charged with always-on AI Agents that live inside your FuseBase workspaces, inside every portal, inside a lightning-fast browser extension, and inside our Zapier-style Automation Hub
